attr.title: PocketTracker
attr.desc: A music tracker for handhelds. Sixteen screens of song, chain, phrase, table and groove editing over a sample engine with per-instrument modulation, a full DSP chain, a sample editor with chopping and time-stretch, and a mixer with sends and a parametric EQ. Renders a finished mix or stems to WAV on the device.
attr.inst: Ready to run - no BIOS, no extra files. Your songs and samples live in the port's own data/ folder: data/Projects, data/Samples, data/Soundfonts, data/Instruments, data/Themes, and data/Renders for anything you bounce. Pull the SD card and drop files straight in; the folders are created the first time you launch. WAV, MP3, FLAC, OGG and Opus all load as samples.
